title: Better Villages
description: New villages, better villages, new village structures, new villagers
body:
If you like villagers, then this mod pack is for you.

You will find new buildings with new villagers inside and if you missed the villagers in the Nether, you will find them there.

NEW TRADERS

Nether Trader
Ocean Trader
Lush Cave Trader
Mushroom Trader

Each of them has its own structure, but there are also three new ones that you can also find in the villages:
Scientist
Diver
and some strange mage

The villages are 3x bigger here and you can even find some in the dark forest, birch biome, underground and in the sky.

At every step you will find some small village structure such as:
Pumpkin house
Village raft or boat
if you look closely at the sky you can also find little George's little flying island![Pumpkin House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b61296191cf9e24acc842239173a842850bd876c_0.webp)
